title: Common Sense Recipes by Caesius_Leo
description: Are you frustrated by the lacking of recipes in minecraft?Try common sense recipes that add more than 100 recipes like the possibility to cut wood in the stone cutter, recycle metal stuff and more!
body:
# Common Sense Recipes

[![Buy Me a Coffee](https://img.shields.io/badge/Buy_Me_a_Coffee-Support_Caesius_Leo-yellow?style=for-the-badge&logo=buy-me-a-coffee&logoColor=black)](https://buymeacoffee.com/caesius_leo)

Are you frustrated with the lack of recipes in Minecraft? Do you feel limited by the few recipes? No problem! Try common sense recipes that add more than 100 recipes. You have the ability to cut wood in the stone cutter, recycle metal material and more!
You can scrap metal armors and tools and recover half of the original material, you can also deconstruct stuff like minecarts and hopper.
Stone and deepslate can be cut in the cobbled variant, all types of wood and logs can be cut in stairs, slabs, planks.

Full list:

STONECUTTER
- Planks and logs can now be cut in the stonecutter in the derived blocks
- Stone can be turned in cobblestone in the stone cutter
- Deepslate can be turned into cobbled deepslate in the stone cutter

CRAFTING
- Iron armors and tools can be scrapped for raw iron (half of the original material)
- Gold armors and tools can be scrapped for raw gold (half of the original material)
- Chainmail armors can now be crafted with chains
- Chain armors can be scrapped for chains (half of the original material)
- Chains can be scrapped for 1 raw iron
- Leather, iron, gold and diamond horse armor can now be crafted
- Iron horse armor can be scrapped for 6 raw iron
- Golden horse armor can be scrapped for 6 raw gold
- Saddle can be crafted with 5 leather and 2 trip hooks
- Wool can be uncrafted in 4 strings
- Hoppers can be scrapped for 5 raw iron
- Minecart with hopper can be scrapped for 10 raw iron
- All the other minecart variants can be scrapped for 5 raw iron
- Anvils can be scrapped for 24, 16, 8 raw iron based on integrity
- 3 iron bars can be scrapped for 1 raw iron
- Iron doors can be scrapped for 2 raw iron
- Iron trapdoors can be scrapped for 4 raw iron

SMELTING AND BLASTING
- Raw iron blocks can be smelted in regular furnace and blasted in the blast furnace but the necessary time is 1800t and 900t for balancing reasons
- Same for gold and copper
- Chains can be smelted or blasted for 1 iron ingot

Hope you enjoy!
